name: recoil_app_attract_fmv_state_constructor
description: RecoilApp_AttractFmvState::Constructor initializes the base state, embedded FMV script, and attract-state vtable.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 75 unmasked mismatches after masking 4 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 81 bytes and the VC object body is 48 bytes with 15 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
zFMV_Script::Init is Binary-safe, but this constructor still differs in caller-side state/vtable setup and cleanup shape.
The native smoke checks returned this pointer, final attract vtable, and embedded FMV script initialization state.
